gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.lat, T1.lng FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Abu Dhabi Grand Prix'
pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.lat, c.lng FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE r.name = 'Abu Dhabi Grand Prix';
question: Give the coordinate position for Abu Dhabi Grand Prix.
